sections.paragraph:
Original: גּדעון

Transliteration: gid‛ôn

Phonetic: ghid-ohn'

BDB Definition:

Gideon = "hewer"
  1. youngest son of Joash of the Abiezrites, fifth judge of Israel who led the Israelites against the Midianites

Origin: from H1438

TWOT entry: 316a

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
